question:
Dumpuses are cold. Dumpuses are numpuses. Each numpus is not bitter. Every numpus is a zumpus. Zumpuses are fruity. Zumpuses are wumpuses. Wumpuses are large. Each tumpus is not wooden. Each wumpus is an impus. Every impus is wooden. Impuses are rompuses. Fae is a dumpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Fae is wooden.
